summary: Post_hoc audit complete. 10 of original 12 post_hoc=false tags were already corrected. Remaining 2 (WIN-031, WIN-044) validated as correctly tagged. Zero WINs have post_hoc_evidence fields — expansion provides evidence rationale for WIN-031 and WIN-044, plus category templates for bulk addition to 68 post_hoc=true WINs. Section prose (SEC-2b.3) already addresses all major curmudgeon concerns. Decider action: apply 2 data patches for post_hoc_evidence fields, schedule bulk evidence addition as lower-priority task.
